◎简　　介  

　　Quasi-autobiographical sitcom pilot from Caitlin Moran and her sister Caroline. The action centres on the elder two of six siblings living on a Wolverhampton council estate, who fill their days with books, films and teenage whimsy while single matriarch Della struggles to make ends meet.
